message:
fix(io_internal_abi): resolve visibility/dead-code clippy errors in memory stream WIP

The new NativeFileBacking infrastructure for memory streams (fmemopen,
open_memstream) was added but not yet wired. This caused:
1. private-interfaces error: NativeFileBacking was private but
   new_with_backing was pub
2. dead_code errors: MemoryFixed/MemoryGrowing variants, backing field,
   and fd() method were unused

Fix: Make NativeFileBacking pub(crate), new_with_backing pub(crate),
and add #[allow(dead_code)] annotations to mark WIP code pending native
fmemopen integration.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
